titleStmt.title: SII 24.317: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 317. (A.R. No. 352 of 1953-54.) SHRINE OF THE GODDESS RAṄGANĀYAKĪ, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Seems to record a grant of some land made free of taxes such as śuṅgam, iḍaittuṟai, chekkuttuṟai, oḻukkunīrppāṭṭam, vil-paṇam, etc., in Nochchiyam, an amara-obuḷi village in Mēlaimuri in Vaḍakarai Maḻanāḍu for worship and offerings to the Nāchchiyār by the king. The details of the date viz. Śārvari, Āḍi 1, falling in Dēvarāya I's reign may be equated to 1420 A.D., June 28, but are insufficient for verification.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīmaṉmakāirācātirācaṉ Irāyaparamecuraṉnum śrīvīrapiṟatāpa teva rāyar makā Irāyar śrīraṅkam nācciyār śrīraṅkanāyakiyārkku Uḻavanāl rūpāy 5(1/2)ü nikki rūpāy 2 10 9khapakku cervai poṉ 4 100 6 10 8- m māvaṭaipoṉ 10
tiruviṭai Āṭṭam Āka kuṭutta taṟumam cātaṉa piṟamāṇam tiruccirāppaḷḷi 2 cāvaṭiyil vaṭakarai maḻaināṭu melai muṟiyil Amara Opuḷiyil nocciyam Āka poṉ 4 100 7 10 8- m cuṅkam Iṭaittuṟai cekkuttuṟai Oḻukkunīrpāṭṭam vilpaṇam maṟṟum pala
kiṟāmam Oṉṟukku kuḷappiṟamāṇam rūpāy 3 10 5 lil Uḷḷur nayanār maṇi Āṇṭār tevatāṉam rūpāy(1/4)�4 māṇikkanampi taṇṭu Iṟaiyili rūpāy 3- li Āka rūpāy 3(1/4)�4kku Upātiyum niṅkalāka cāṟuvari varuṣam Āṭi mātam 1 2 mutal nācciyārkku Aṅkaraṅkapoka Amutukku cantaṟātittavaraiyum naṭakka kaṭa
vatākavum §This inscription is followed by the following short one which is apparently connected with it.
nocciyam
paṭ(ṭa)ṭaiyat
tukku Etira
ṭai
cāṟuvari varuṣam
Āṭi � tma
Digital edition of SII 24.317 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
